plugins.name: cc-harness
plugins.description: Two-command harness for Claude Code: role separation (PLN/IMP/VER) with verification chosen to fit each goal, plus cross-model adversarial pressure — the Skeptic (/explore) and Verifier (/execute) seats run on the Codex peer model. /explore debates read-only; /execute builds under a mutation gate with a Codex-driven adversarial review at plan lock.
